ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "working_sector" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sectors table */,
  "financial_weight" INTEGER /* Annual financial weight (income) of the individual */,
  "qualification" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the education_levels table */,
  "years_of_education" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "tax_paid" REAL /* Tax paid by the individual (if applicable) */,
  "loan_taken" INTEGER /* Total amount of loans taken by the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status within the household */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "gain" INTEGER /* Financial gain over the past year */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Financial loss over the past year */,
  "working_hours" INTEGER /* Average number of hours worked per week */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable indicating potential high-value customer (0 or 1) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the individual has */,
  "last_loan_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last loan payment */,
  "last_tax_filing_date" TEXT /* Date of the last tax filing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_qualification FOREIGN KEY ("qualification") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_working_sector FOREIGN KEY ("working_sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of individuals in this sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Name of the educational qualification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational qualification */,
  "average_years_of_education" INTEGER /* Average number of years of education for this qualification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the individuals table */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was taken */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
